list.title: BajoExtra
list.description: Constructor

list.title: BajoExtra#countFileLines
list.description: Count the number of lines in a file.

list.title: BajoExtra#createThumbnail
list.description: Create a thumbnail for a given image file.

list.title: BajoExtra#decrypt
list.description: Decrypt a given cipher using the specified decryption type and options.

list.title: BajoExtra#download
list.description: Download a file from a URL.

list.title: BajoExtra#encrypt
list.description: Encrypt a given text using the specified encryption type and options.

list.title: BajoExtra#fetchAndSave
list.description: Fetch data from a URL and save it using the specified options.

list.title: BajoExtra#fetchBulk
list.description: Fetch data from a URL in bulk, processing it in steps and applying a handler function to each item.

list.title: BajoExtra#fetchUrl
list.description: Download a file/resource from a URL.

list.title: BajoExtra#formatByte
list.description: Format a value as bytes.

list.title: BajoExtra#formatFloat
list.description: Format a value as a floating-point number.

list.title: BajoExtra#formatInteger
list.description: Format a value as an integer.

list.title: BajoExtra#formatPercentage
list.description: Format a value as a percentage.

list.title: BajoExtra#gunzip
list.description: Gunzip a file, optionally deleting the original file after extraction.

list.title: BajoExtra#gzip
list.description: Gzip or gunzip a file, optionally deleting the original file after the operation.

list.title: BajoExtra#hash
list.description: Hash a given text or object using the specified algorithm and options.

list.title: BajoExtra#isBcrypt
list.description: Check if a given text is a bcrypt hash.

list.title: BajoExtra#isHtmlLink
list.description: Check if a given text is an HTML link.

list.title: BajoExtra#isMd5
list.description: Check if a given text is an MD5 hash.

list.title: BajoExtra#isSha256
list.description: Check if a given text is a SHA-256 hash.

list.title: BajoExtra#randomRange
list.description: Generate a random number or letter within a specified range.

list.title: BajoExtra#thumbnailSizes
list.description: Get the dimensions for a given thumbnail size name.

list.title: factory
list.description:
Plugin factory.

Never call this function directly!!! It's only-meant to be called by the {@link https://ardhi.github.io/bajo|Bajo framework} during plugin initialization.
